content: whisper.cpp word-level timestamps via -ml 1 (--max-len 1) which forces one-word lines; token timestamps from DTW alignment of cross-attention. Timestamps can drift 100-400ms vs actual word boundaries, varies by model. Whisper hallucinates on silence (e.g. 'Thank you for watching') and can loop on silent segments; VAD preprocessing mitigates. Larger models = better accuracy but slower; on macOS use Metal/Core ML acceleration. Word timing precision is good enough for captions but not frame-perfect.
